titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Susan M. Watkins Papers
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michelle Wickham

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday July 1, 2023 at 08:26

did.abstract: Susan M. Watkins was a Seth researcher and author of books including "Conversations with Seth." She was known for her writings on psychic and spiritual phenomena including extrasensory perception (ESP), as well as for being a long-time friend and associate of Seth channeler Jane Roberts. The papers include correspondence and interviews with Roberts and others in the Seth community, audio and videotapes, manuscripts, publications, and related materials.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged in five series: I. Correspondence, 1954-2013. II. ESP classes, 1969-1999. III. Manuscripts and publications, 1968-2007. IV. Subject files, 2008. V. Audiovisual material, 1982-2008.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Susan M. Watkins Papers (MS 2120). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Related materials: Mary Dillman papers (MS 2119); Jane Roberts papers (MS 1090).

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for unpublished materials authored or otherwise produced by Susan M. Watkins was transferred to Yale University in 2021. These materials may be used for non-commercial purposes without seeking permission from Yale University as the copyright holder. For other uses of these materials, please contact beinecke.library@yale.edu.Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Susan M. Watkins (1945-2022) was a Seth researcher and author of books including "Speaking of Jane Roberts" and "Conversations with Seth." She was known primarily for her writings on extrasensory perception (ESP) and other psychic and spiritual phenomena, as well as for her association with Jane Roberts and with the wider Seth community.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Susan M. Watkins papers include correspondence and interviews with Jane Roberts and others in the Seth community, audio and videotapes, manuscripts, publications, and related materials. The bulk of the material consists of correspondence, as well as materials relating to the efforts of Watkins and others to write books about Seth and related topics.

A significant portion of these files pertains to Watkins's book "Conversations with Seth: The Story of Jane Roberts's ESP Class." Included in this category are the series ESP classes and the series, "Conversations with Seth," by Susan M. Watkins (1980), located in Series II.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Correspondence is arranged alphabetically by folder title and then chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Processing note: folder 1 ("Correspondence, dates unknown") includes an envelope containing coins.

did.unittitle: Robert Butts and Jane Roberts personal notes and letters
Robert Butts correspondence regarding unpublished biography and memoir of Jane Roberts
Susan Watkins articles and correspondence regarding channeling and lawsuit
Susan Watkins correspondence with publishers regarding "Conversations with Seth"
Susan Watkins letters to Tam Mossman
Tam Mossman letters to Susan Watkins
Information from other ESP class members

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This subseries is arranged alphabetically by student surname.

did.unittitle: Conversations with Seth by Susan M. Watkins (1980)
Conversations with Seth illustrations and notes
Dreaming Myself, Dreaming a Town by Susan M. Watkins (1989)
Dreaming Myself, Dreaming a Town correspondence, press, and related materials
Dreaming Myself, Dreaming a Town publishing materials
The Mediumship of Zachary Larue manuscript by Susan Watkins (unpublished)
The Seth Material by Jane Roberts (1970)
Robert Butts' original proposal for publication of The Seth Material
Seth on Dreams manuscript by Debbie Harris (unpublished)
Speaking of Jane Roberts by Susan M. Watkins (2001)
Articles, book reviews, and news clippings regarding work of Jane Roberts
Background research and correspondence regarding remembrances of Jane Roberts
Carroll Stamp essays regarding Jane Roberts
Debbie Harris journal notes and email correspondence
Jane Roberts' and Susan Watkins' writings
Letters and notes regarding Jane Roberts
Original copy of Debbie Harris journal with footnotes and annotations by Susan Watkins
Photographs for Speaking of Jane Roberts
Susan Thornton comments used in Speaking of Jane Roberts
Transcript of Frank Longwell speaking about Jane Roberts, Robert Butts, and Seth
Richard Kendall writings regarding Jane Roberts
Robert Butts' last days and obituary
Dave Scott "All Night Live" Seth discussion group videotape (VHS)
Note by Susan Watkins accompanying "All Night Live" videotape

did.physdesc: 28.84 Megabytes. This reflects the size of the carrier media, but may not accurately reflect the extent of digital files available for research.

did.unittitle: Letters by Günter Sostaríc accompanying compact disc (CD-R)
Interview with Susan Watkins by Bob Terrio in Elmira, New York, videotape (VHS)
Letter by Susan Watkins accompanying "New York Boys" videotape
Letter by Anna Peck accompanying "Songs for Susan"
"Story for Sean and message to Sue" audiocasette
Note by Paul and Joanne Helfrich accompanying "Various Sumari Songs"
